tasks.title: 环境配置与数据下载
tasks.description: 运行setup.sh安装conda环境(Python 3.10, PyTorch, cesnet-datazoo)，然后运行download_data.sh下载CESNET-QUIC22和CESNET-TLS-Year22数据集
tasks.nextActionPrompt: cd Experiment/core_code && bash setup.sh --gpu && bash scripts/download_data.sh --size S

tasks.title: 训练CNN源模型 (QUIC22)
tasks.description: 在CESNET-QUIC22 W-2022-44上训练1D-CNN源模型，使用GroupNorm，联合cls+SSL损失。验证训练后模型在W-44上的准确率，保存baseline_entropy.npy

tasks.title: 训练Transformer源模型 (QUIC22)
tasks.description: 在CESNET-QUIC22上训练Transformer编码器源模型(4层,256维,LayerNorm)，联合cls+SSL损失

tasks.title: 训练CNN源模型 (TLS-Year22)
tasks.description: 在CESNET-TLS-Year22 M-2022-3上训练1D-CNN源模型，用于长期评估

tasks.title: 短期评估：所有方法 on QUIC22 W-45
tasks.description: 在CESNET-QUIC22 W-45上评估所有方法(Static, BN-Adapt, Tent, EATA, CoTTA, SAR, NOTE, TTA-TC)。验证13.48%准确率下降(Static)，并与TTA方法比较
tasks.nextActionPrompt: cd Experiment/core_code && python evaluate_tta.py --config configs/eval_quic22.yaml --checkpoint outputs/quic22_cnn/best_model.pt --output-dir outputs/eval_quic22_single --mode single

tasks.title: 连续评估：QUIC22 三周 (W-45→W-46→W-47)
tasks.description: 在CESNET-QUIC22上执行连续TTA评估：模型在W-45/46/47上连续适应(不重置)，计算ARR和AURC指标
tasks.nextActionPrompt: cd Experiment/core_code && python evaluate_tta.py --config configs/eval_quic22.yaml --checkpoint outputs/quic22_cnn/best_model.pt --output-dir outputs/eval_quic22_sequential --mode sequential

tasks.title: 消融实验A1：SSL任务选择
tasks.description: 分别评估MPFP/POP/FSR单独、MPFP+POP、全部三个任务的TTA性能，验证H4假设
tasks.nextActionPrompt: cd Experiment/core_code && python run_ablation.py --ablation-config configs/ablation_ssl_tasks.yaml --checkpoint outputs/quic22_cnn/best_model.pt --output-dir outputs/ablations/ssl_tasks

tasks.title: 消融实验A2：掩码比例
tasks.description: 评估MPFP在5%/10%/15%/25%/50%掩码比例下的TTA性能
tasks.nextActionPrompt: cd Experiment/core_code && python run_ablation.py --ablation-config configs/ablation_mask_ratio.yaml --checkpoint outputs/quic22_cnn/best_model.pt --output-dir outputs/ablations/mask_ratio

tasks.title: 消融实验A3：适应深度
tasks.description: 评估仅适应Norm参数 vs 适应完整编码器的TTA性能差异
tasks.nextActionPrompt: cd Experiment/core_code && python run_ablation.py --ablation-config configs/ablation_adapt_depth.yaml --checkpoint outputs/quic22_cnn/best_model.pt --output-dir outputs/ablations/adapt_depth

tasks.title: 消融实验A5：抗遗忘机制
tasks.description: 评估无抗遗忘/仅Fisher/仅随机恢复/两者结合的TTA稳定性
tasks.nextActionPrompt: cd Experiment/core_code && python run_ablation.py --ablation-config configs/ablation_anti_forgetting.yaml --checkpoint outputs/quic22_cnn/best_model.pt --output-dir outputs/ablations/anti_forgetting

tasks.title: 长期评估：TLS-Year22 九个月 (M-4→M-12)
tasks.description: 在CESNET-TLS-Year22上执行9个月连续TTA评估，验证H5假设(ARR>0.90 at 6个月)
tasks.nextActionPrompt: cd Experiment/core_code && python evaluate_tta.py --config configs/eval_tls22.yaml --checkpoint outputs/tls22_cnn/best_model.pt --output-dir outputs/eval_tls22_sequential --mode sequential

tasks.title: Transformer骨干评估
tasks.description: 评估Transformer编码器在QUIC22上的TTA性能，与CNN对比(消融A7)
tasks.nextActionPrompt: cd Experiment/core_code && python evaluate_tta.py --config configs/eval_quic22.yaml --checkpoint outputs/quic22_transformer/best_model.pt --output-dir outputs/eval_quic22_transformer --mode sequential

tasks.title: 结果分析与可视化
tasks.description: 汇总所有实验结果，生成论文用表格和图表：(1)方法对比表, (2)ARR曲线图, (3)Per-class recall衰减热力图, (4)消融结果表
tasks.nextActionPrompt: 使用 inno-experiment-analysis 技能分析所有实验结果

tasks.title: 论文撰写
tasks.description: 基于实验结果撰写论文，目标NDSS/CCS/USENIX Security。结构：Introduction, Background, TTA-TC Design, Experimental Evaluation, Discussion, Related Work, Conclusion
